visited.title: About British School Portal | British School Portal
visited.pageText:
LOGIN / REGISTER FOR FREE
About Us Independent Schools Other Schools Educational Consultant Business Blogs Content Area 繁
HOME
ABOUT BRITISH SCHOOL PORTAL
ABOUT BRITISH SCHOOL PORTAL

Every parent wants the best for their children, and we understand that the process of choosing schools and related services in the UK can be daunting. That's why our goal is to provide you with the most current information to make the decision-making process easier.

Since our launch in 2020, we have integrated the UK government's database with over 55,000 registered educational institutions across England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland. We have transformed this vast database into an easy-to-use platform, with a simple interface that anyone can navigate.

With just one click, you can view different types of schools near you, including "Special Education," "Home Office licensed Student Sponsor on Student Visa," and "Grammar Schools," all displayed on a map.

We have also partnered with various service providers, including Guardian Services, International and Local Removal Companies, Car Rentals, Educational Resources, and many more. This helps you save time in planning your journey to the new school by eliminating the need for additional searches.

In the future, we plan to analyze more data to provide parents with a comprehensive search platform. Our ultimate goal is to make the school searching process in the UK as seamless and stress-free as possible for you and your family.

BS Portal
We wish you can find a suitable school very soon.
